elements.original_description: A green dollar sign with a plus symbol, floating slightly above a white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: A professional 2D minimalist icon of a vibrant green dollar sign paired with a plus symbol, floating slightly above a pure white background. Clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients, crisp edges, isolated on a clean white background with no text, letters, numbers, or watermarks.

elements.original_description: A stack of three crisp $50 bills, neatly arranged on a white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: A high-quality photograph of a stack of three crisp $50 bills, neatly and precisely arranged on a pure white background. Cinematic lighting with soft shadows to emphasize texture, sharp focus on the bills' details, high resolution, isolated with no text, letters, numbers, or watermarks.

elements.original_description: A shiny silver credit card with a chip, tilted slightly to show its reflective surface on a white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: A high-quality photograph of a shiny silver credit card with a visible chip, tilted slightly to catch light and show its reflective metallic surface on a pure white background. Cinematic lighting with highlights and soft bokeh, sharp focus on the card's details, high resolution, isolated with no text, letters, numbers, or watermarks.

elements.original_description: A stack of three credit cards in different colors, arranged neatly on a white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: A professional 2D minimalist icon of a stack of three credit cards in distinct colors (e.g., blue, red, black), arranged neatly and uniformly on a pure white background. Clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients, crisp edges, isolated with no text, letters, numbers, or watermarks.

elements.original_description: A piggy bank with coins spilling out, surrounded by green dollar signs on a white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: A professional 2D minimalist icon of a piggy bank with coins spilling out from its slot, surrounded by several green dollar signs, all on a pure white background. Clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients, playful arrangement, isolated with no text, letters, numbers, or watermarks.
